creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to mike.jakubik from comment #4)

I'd like to take on this because I need this for Sonatype Nexus 2. Sadly, I have been waiting for my port update approval of Nexus for months now, no avail. I don't want to invest any time into something if no one is willing to review within  a several months timeframe.
